auth.switchSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.googleNotConfigured: Google OAuth client IDs are not configured yet.
auth.firebaseNotConfigured: Firebase config is missing on the app.
auth.googleAuthNotReady: Google Auth request is not ready yet.
auth.microsoftNotConfigured: Microsoft client ID or tenant ID is missing.
auth.microsoftAuthNotReady: Microsoft Auth request is not ready yet.
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.networkError: Cannot reach the server. Check internet and that EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL is correct in your EAS build.
auth.serverError: The server returned an error (e.g. registration). Try again later or ask the API team to deploy the latest backend fix.
auth.socialPaused: Google and Microsoft sign-in are paused in this build. Use email and password.
auth.diagOAuthKeysPresent: Google/Microsoft: keys are in the build, but social sign-in buttons are disabled in this version (use email above).
auth.diagOAuthKeysMissing: Google/Microsoft: build keys incomplete; a future enable still needs an EAS rebuild with EXPO_PUBLIC_*.
auth.googleNotInBuild: Google sign-in needs Firebase + Google client IDs in the EAS build (EXPO_PUBLIC_*). Rebuild the app after setting secrets.

feed.title: Alloul One
feed.sub: Signals from trusted companies, teams, and verified professionals.

workHome.banner: Stay aligned · Updates & milestones in one place

approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.placeholderHasItems: Requests will appear here when connected to your workflow API.
approvals.trackingBody: Items you submitted for approval will show here. Hook this tab to your approvals tracking endpoint when ready.

services.title: Services
services.integrationsSub: Connect tools your company already uses
services.noCompany: No company on the server yet.

team.title: Team
team.empty: No members returned — you may need company access.
team.errorHint: You must belong to a company and be signed in.

projects.title: Projects
projects.empty: No projects from the server yet.

explore.title: Explore
explore.hint: Search across the platform. Results come from the live API.

profile.title: Profile
profile.signInHint: Sign in to see your profile.

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.body: Video meetings and calendar sync will connect here. Use the web app for full meeting features until mobile integration ships.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.empty: No conversation history from the server yet.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.body: Job listings are not available in the mobile app yet. Check back soon or use the Alloul web app.

messages.title: Messages
messages.body: Chat (Sendbird / Stream) is not wired in this build yet. Use the web app for messaging.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageSubtitle: App interface (5 languages). Content from the server can use Accept-Language.
settings.restartHint: If layout looks wrong after switching to Arabic, restart the app once.
settings.apiDocsHint: Swagger UI for this environment (same host as the API).
settings.googleMissing: Google sign-in: not configured (empty keys in build)
settings.rebuildHint: Set env in Expo (EAS) then run a new iOS build.
